overview: Plethora Air Pura is a premium pitch-deck style website showcasing a smart air purification system. Built with a futuristic dark theme, neon glow accents, and glassmorphism cards, it presents the problem, solution, impact, and vision of clean air technology in a startup investor-ready format.
features: Animated hero section with particle/smoke background effect
Problem section with real-world pollution stats and icon cards
Solution overview introducing Air Pura's smart purification system
Six glowing USP cards with hover animations
Team & About section with project info
Final CTA with dual call-to-action design
Pure black dark theme with neon cyan and electric blue glow accents
Glassmorphism card design with smooth transitions
